The Shani, however. rules the l~h house also and the Buddha owns

The Surya is in the Navamsa of the Shukra which is a Yoga Karh,
i.e. . it rules a Trine and a Kendra. The Surya is in the Nakshatra of the
Ketu whi(h is strong both by the sign and the house. The Surya.
however. is att~ from the Chandra.
The Surya, in the birth chart. is strong. we may conclude.
In the Navamsa chart the Surya rules the 71 h house and occupies
the 41 h house. Thus the Surya both rules and occupies a Kendra. It is
conjoined by the lord of the Lagna. The dispositor of the SUrya. the
Shukla, is a Yoga Karka. The Shukra is in its exaltation and it is conjoined
by its dispositor. the Guru. The Shani conjoins the SUrya and the Shani
owns the 12tt~ house. But the Shanl fully aspe<ts the Lagna which it
owns and rules. The Shanl also aspects two of the Uppachaya houses
